text: Walking through these bright, glass-walled corridors into a space filled with the language of research and development, I feel both curiosity and a subtle unease. The environment is sleek and modern, yet the poetic text about confusion, rhythm, and meaning resonates with my inner uncertainty. There is a quiet thrill in confronting the unknown, in spaces designed to foster innovation but which also remind me how meaning often emerges only after wandering in ambiguity. I feel thoughtful, invited to reflect on the coexistence of clarity and confusion in discovery.
